name: Build Wraithborn APK

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Scaffold Android project
        run: |
          mkdir -p app/src/main/assets
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/mipmap-hdpi
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/mipmap-mdpi
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/mipmap-xhdpi
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/mipmap-xxhdpi
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/mipmap-xxxhdpi
          mkdir -p app/src/main/res/values

          cp index.html app/src/main/assets/index.html

          # ── settings.gradle ────────────────────────────
          cat > settings.gradle << 'EOF'
          pluginManagement {
            repositories {
              google()
              mavenCentral()
              gradlePluginPortal()
            }
          }
          dependencyResolutionManagement {
            repositoriesMode.set(RepositoriesMode.FAIL_ON_PROJECT_REPOS)
            repositories {
              google()
              mavenCentral()
            }
          }
          rootProject.name = "Wraithborn"
          include ':app'
          EOF

          # ── root build.gradle ──────────────────────────
          cat > build.gradle << 'EOF'
          buildscript {
            ext { agp_version = '8.2.2' }
            repositories { google(); mavenCentral() }
            dependencies {
              classpath "com.android.tools.build:gradle:$agp_version"
            }
          }
          EOF

          # ── gradle wrapper ─────────────────────────────
          mkdir -p gradle/wrapper
          cat > gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties << 'EOF'
          distributionBase=GRADLE_USER_HOME
          distributionPath=wrapper/dists
          distributionUrl=https\://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.4-bin.zip
          zipStoreBase=GRADLE_USER_HOME
          zipStorePath=wrapper/dists
          EOF

          # ── app/build.gradle ───────────────────────────
          cat > app/build.gradle << 'EOF'
          plugins {
            id 'com.android.application'
          }
          android {
            namespace 'com.dcheshirecat.wraithborn'
            compileSdk 34
            defaultConfig {
              applicationId 'com.dcheshirecat.wraithborn'
              minSdk 26
              targetSdk 34
              versionCode 1
              versionName '1.0.0'
            }
            buildTypes {
              release {
                minifyEnabled false
              }
            }
            compileOptions {
              sourceCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_17
              targetCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_17
            }
          }
          dependencies {
            implementation 'androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.6.1'
          }
          EOF

          # ── gradle.properties ─────────────────────────
          cat > gradle.properties << 'EOF'
          android.useAndroidX=true
          android.enableJetifier=true
          org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m
          EOF

          # ── AndroidManifest.xml ────────────────────────
          cat > app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml << 'EOF'
          <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
          <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
            <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET"/>
            <application
              android:label="Wraithborn"
              android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
              android:theme="@style/AppTheme"
              android:hardwareAccelerated="true">
              <activity
                android:name=".MainActivity"
                android:exported="true"
                android:screenOrientation="portrait"
                android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize">
                <intent-filter>
                  <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN"/>
                  <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER"/>
                </intent-filter>
              </activity>
            </application>
          </manifest>
          EOF

          # ── res/values/styles.xml ──────────────────────
          cat > app/src/main/res/values/styles.xml << 'EOF'
          <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
          <resources>
            <style name="AppTheme" parent="Theme.AppCompat.NoActionBar">
              <item name="android:windowBackground">#0a0612</item>
              <item name="android:statusBarColor">#0a0612</item>
              <item name="android:navigationBarColor">#0a0612</item>
            </style>
          </resources>
          EOF

          # ── MainActivity.java ──────────────────────────
          mkdir -p app/src/main/java/com/dcheshirecat/wraithborn
          cat > app/src/main/java/com/dcheshirecat/wraithborn/MainActivity.java << 'EOF'
          package com.dcheshirecat.wraithborn;

          import android.app.Activity;
          import android.os.Bundle;
          import android.webkit.WebSettings;
          import android.webkit.WebView;
          import android.webkit.WebViewClient;
          import android.view.Window;
          import android.view.WindowManager;
          import android.graphics.Color;

          public class MainActivity extends Activity {
            private WebView webView;

            @Override
            protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
              super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
              requestWindowFeature(Window.FEATURE_NO_TITLE);
              getWindow().setFlags(
                WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_FULLSCREEN,
                WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_FULLSCREEN
              );
              getWindow().setStatusBarColor(Color.parseColor("#0a0612"));
              getWindow().setNavigationBarColor(Color.parseColor("#0a0612"));

              webView = new WebView(this);
              setContentView(webView);

              WebSettings s = webView.getSettings();
              s.setJavaScriptEnabled(true);
              s.setDomStorageEnabled(true);
              s.setAllowFileAccess(true);
              s.setDatabaseEnabled(true);
              s.setCacheMode(WebSettings.LOAD_DEFAULT);
              s.setMediaPlaybackRequiresUserGesture(false);

              webView.setBackgroundColor(Color.parseColor("#0a0612"));
              webView.setWebViewClient(new WebViewClient());
              webView.loadUrl("file:///android_asset/index.html");
            }

            @Override
            public void onBackPressed() {
              if (webView.canGoBack()) webView.goBack();
              else super.onBackPressed();
            }

            @Override
            protected void onPause() {
              super.onPause();
              webView.onPause();
            }

            @Override
            protected void onResume() {
              super.onResume();
              webView.onResume();
            }
          }
          EOF

      - name: Generate launcher icon
        run: |
          pip install pillow --quiet --break-system-packages
          python3 - << 'PYEOF'
          import base64, os, io
          from PIL import Image

          # Pre-built valid 192x192 RGBA PNG: dark purple circle with gold W
          B64 = (
            "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAMAAAADACAYAAABS3GwHAAAEq0lEQVR42u3dwXHbUAxFUa2yyDIt"
            "udkUlH6cCuyRZBIfwDuYeesY5L0AY9Ffj4dSSp2q37/+fLoKag3MVXG1VQToxFCAJ4QCPCEU6Mmg"
            "QE8GBXwiKNCTQQGfCAr4RFDAJwLwhQjgFxIAX4gAfCEC+IUEwBcigF9IAHwhAviFBOAXEoBfSAB+"
            "IQHwhQjgFxKAX0gAfiEB+IUE4BcSgF9IAH4hAfiFBAQQAoBfSAB+IQH4hQTfwv/v78eXcXNz8yoX"
            "4+D/rkEiAP8dLkYI8EqDJAD/K2yshZ8E4B8rwZVNkgD8z3CxcvqTAPzjtsDdjQoB2m6Bu5okAAFG"
            "SHBnkyQAf2sBqhsVArT6bKCiURKAv6UAJ5sVAhx9TaJDs0KAYxJUN0sC8LcRoJvxYvqXStDRejH9"
            "SwTo3rgQ4FYJuq8+8fhzmwCT7Jfs6X+LBNMmgORO/8sFmDwFJHP6XyoBAYQAg1eh5D3+XCbApmkg"
            "WdP/Egm2TQTJmf4/FmDzVJCM6f8jCQggBFi8GmX/48/bAiRNB8m4v0dPdyYAAU7f25UCkMD0v1yA"
            "9Asle+/r0S+3IAABTt/TlQJMkiCtFwLYAm/3bfofEMDU6NWz6V8sgQvX+0x8AgwXIO0xSF/9el0r"
            "QDdY9DVMABOEACn3bq0AXWDRFwEIoC8CJD4GbZZ7S1+rBTgNir4IELsF7oRka28nemkB/8ZpuVWA"
            "jUITYCD8G3uLFmDTaiXArP/TrBeg8gJXwr+pNwIsmTAEmPcr3QgBqi70VgE2f6ZBgMHwb+iNAEtW"
            "LQFmvtYRI8CdF/wk/JN7I8CSiUOAua92Rwlwx4XvAP/E3ghAAAIQYPbq7QT/pP46cdYS/inTZ7MA"
            "SSd3xEmwFf4J/bWF3xYgQPT0JwABCODwpfHwd+6vI1+xAvzkhmwWIO3YyvYCdJtIE+Dv2F9XtqIF"
            "eOfGbBYg8dRuAiyFv1t/BFjwGESAfV9cEi/AszdoIvxd+iPAgi1wNyBbBejOFAGeuFEVE/rkFkj+"
            "4kICNAKEAMHHI3Z+DCJACPy2gH+PAM1/6OqJRYC9X1pOgPBn8uTpTwACEGCqABWrO+GDqWT4vxTA"
            "FviIEMD0P/xF2dv/Ljf11Yvx058AGW9nEoAABCAACVL/Qgv8BCAAAeYL4JQG8BOAAAS4WgCPQY5i"
            "jH38sQUIED/9CeA49ngBSECAaPgJQAACEKAVHAQoFoAEBIiGnwD94CBAsQAkIEA0/AToBwcBCEAA"
            "AtQJQIJ+YIC/EH4CECBeABL0AwP8hfATgADxAnhNmgDR8NsC/cAAf7EAtgABouG3BfqBAf5iAWwB"
            "AkTD7xzRfmA47/NAOU1aj9ECJG8BfYI/egvokQCxW0Cf4I/+hkl9gj92C+iTANES6BH8sRIkfAIO"
            "fr8VGg1+Qp+P7rUFkMngb+3zMaU2wSPgJ4GAnwQCfhII+AkgBCCBgJ8EAn4SCPhJIOAngYCfBAJ+"
            "Egj4SSDgJ4IAnwQCfhKAX5EA/IoE4FdEAL4iAfgVEYCvSAB+RQTgKyIAX5EA/IoIwFdEAL4iAvAV"
            "EYCvyAB6RQTgKzKAXpEB9IoQgFeEALwKEcPVVmukcRXO1X8HDrkaI5CA0wAAAABJRU5ErkJggg=="
          )

          png_data = base64.b64decode(B64)
          img_192 = Image.open(io.BytesIO(png_data)).convert("RGBA")

          sizes = {
            'mdpi': 48, 'hdpi': 72, 'xhdpi': 96,
            'xxhdpi': 144, 'xxxhdpi': 192
          }
          for dpi, sz in sizes.items():
            path = f'app/src/main/res/mipmap-{dpi}/ic_launcher.png'
            os.makedirs(os.path.dirname(path), exist_ok=True)
            img = img_192.resize((sz, sz), Image.LANCZOS)
            img.save(path, 'PNG')
            print(f'  icon {dpi} ({sz}px) written')
          PYEOF

      - name: Download Gradle wrapper jar
        run: |
          mkdir -p gradle/wrapper
          curl -sL "https://github.com/gradle/gradle/raw/v8.4.0/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar" \
            -o gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar || \
          curl -sL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gradle/gradle/master/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar" \
            -o gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar || true

          # Fallback: generate wrapper via gradle itself
          if [ ! -s gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar ]; then
            wget -q https://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.4-bin.zip -O /tmp/gradle.zip
            unzip -q /tmp/gradle.zip -d /tmp/gradle-dist
            /tmp/gradle-dist/gradle-8.4/bin/gradle wrapper --gradle-version 8.4 --project-dir .
          fi

      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: |
          if [ ! -f gradlew ]; then
            cat > gradlew << 'EOF'
          #!/bin/sh
          exec java -jar gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.jar "$@"
          EOF
            # Actually generate proper gradlew
            curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gradle/gradle/v8.4.0/gradlew -o gradlew || true
          fi
          chmod +x gradlew

      - name: Setup Gradle
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3
        with:
          gradle-version: '8.4'

      - name: Generate keystore
        run: |
          keytool -genkeypair \
            -alias wraithborn \
            -keyalg RSA \
            -keysize 2048 \
            -validity 365 \
            -keystore wraithborn.jks \
            -storepass wraithborn123 \
            -keypass wraithborn123 \
            -dname "CN=Wraithborn, OU=App, O=dcheshirecat, L=Unknown, ST=Unknown, C=US"

      - name: Build APK
        run: gradle assembleRelease

      - name: Sign APK
        run: |
          BUILD_TOOLS=$(ls $ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/ | sort -V | tail -1)
          $ANDROID_HOME/build-tools/$BUILD_TOOLS/apksigner sign \
            --ks wraithborn.jks \
            --ks-pass pass:wraithborn123 \
            --key-pass pass:wraithborn123 \
            --ks-key-alias wraithborn \
            --out Wraithborn.apk \
            app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk

      - name: Upload APK
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: Wraithborn-APK
          path: Wraithborn.apk
          retention-days: 30
